title: CI - colon-img should only trigger if present in git subject
body:
PR #7317 ran the See Aye Colon Aye Em Gee set of tests, instead of real CI tests, because the string See Aye Colon Aye Em Gee was present in the git commit message **body**. This allowed a bad PR to merge, causing hours of lost work for everyone.

The cirrus magic should differentiate between git commit _subject_ and _body_, and only trigger the magic VM rebuild if See Aye Colon Aye Em Gee is present in the _subject_.
